title: Take a Chance on Me
why_this_song: Take a Chance on Me by ABBA (1978) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: (That's all I ask of you honey)
We can go dancing (oh-oh) we can go walking (yeah)
Honey I'm still free, take a chance on me
Gonna do my very best, baby can't you see?
Gotta put me to the test, take a chance on me

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "chance" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "chance" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "honey" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "honey" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: If you change your mind (take a chance)
(Come on, give me a break, will you?)

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Honey, I'm still free (take a chance)

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Take a Chance on Me" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Take a Chance on Me" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Take a Chance on Me" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Take a Chance on Me"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask ABBA one question about "Take a Chance on Me", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para ABBA sobre "Take a Chance on Me", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
